revision.text: {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Nepal | flag alias = Flag of Nepal.svg | flag alias-old = Flag of Nepal (1775–1962).svg | flag alias-1930 = Flag of Nepal (1775–1962).svg | flag alias-1768 = Flag of Nepal (19th century).svg | flag alias-1856 = Flag of Nepal (1856-c.1930).svg | link alias-army = Nepali Army | border = | size = {{{size|}}} | size flag alias = 24x20px | size flag alias-old = 24x20px | size flag alias-1930 = 24x20px | size flag alias-1768 = 24px | size flag alias-1856 = 24x20px | sizebig flag alias = x27px | sizebig flag alias-old = x27px | sizebig flag alias-1930 = x27px | sizebig flag alias-1768 = x30px | sizebig flag alias-1856 = x27px | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | var1 = old | var2 = 1930 | var3 = 1768 | var4 = 1856 | redir1 = NPL | redir2 = NEP | redir3 = Federal Democratic Republic of Nepal </noinclude> }}<noinclude> <!-- INTERWIKIS GO TO WIKIDATA, THANK YOU! --> </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
